title: Single-cell multi-omic and spatial profiling of human kidneys implicates the fibrotic microenvironment in kidney disease progression.
abstract:
Single-cell multi-omic and spatial profiling of human kidneys implicates the 
fibrotic microenvironment in kidney disease progression.
query: kidney spatial transcriptomics cell type deconvolution

ml_recommendations.rationale: Multi-block integration: MOFA+ or SNF latent factors as features, then standard classifier. Late fusion (train per-modality, vote) is robust when sample sizes differ across modalities. Early concatenation + LASSO is a strong baseline.
